input.tenant_message: The smoke detector in the hallway outside my bedroom has been beeping every 30 seconds since around 2am. I tried pressing the test/reset button but it won't stop. It's keeping me and my kids awake and I'm worried there's a real issue with it.

ai_output.recommended_action: Send maintenance to replace the smoke detector battery or the entire unit same day — a chirping detector may indicate low battery or a failed sensor, both of which must be resolved promptly to ensure life-safety compliance. Verify replacement unit meets local fire code requirements.
